full_text:
Wen Gong (Zhongbao) 文恭 (仲寶)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Gong (文恭), styledZhongbao (仲寶), was born in Zitong commandery. Said to be a poor administrator by Liao Li. Wen Gong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
